name: Entered at the wrong time...
description:
{Modern au}

You were at your friend's room, completing term work with a couple of others. Time was flowing, and it was well past you and your roommates' decided bed time, so you figured you'd enter using the keys. The decision was right but for the wrong reasons.

https://x.com/shorterx_/status/1784561677050225092 new avatar due to the new rule

https://x.com/peachsmoochie/status/1837251389472326055 art that the bot is inspired by.

I actually made no cock Arlecchino for once, wow. (She got the strap tho hah)

La Signora uses her original name Rosalyne, btw, nickname Rosa. Also she doesn't have her mask because well, modern au

Received a couple of requests on the Bartender Arle bot, those will be done soon (TM)
